title: SoundPress
description: SoundPress lets you replace vanilla music discs with your own custom .ogg tracks
body:
🎵 SoundPress

SoundPress is a fully client-side mod that allows you to replace vanilla Minecraft music discs with your own custom .ogg audio files.

✨ Features

📀 Bind custom .ogg files to vanilla music discs

🔊 Automatically replaces disc playback in jukebox

⚙ Simple command-based configuration

🔄 Reload support without restarting the game

📂 How It Works

Place your .ogg files inside:



.minecraft/soundpress/


Bind a file to a music disc:



/soundpress bind mytrack.ogg


Insert the disc into a jukebox.

Your custom track will play instead of the vanilla music.

📡 Multiplayer Compatibility

SoundPress is completely client-side.

Players without the mod will hear normal vanilla discs.

⚠ Requirements

Minecraft 1.21.1

NeoForge

Only .ogg format is supported

🎧 Why SoundPress?

Personalize your world

Create custom server atmospheres

Replace discs with your favorite tracks

Keep full vanilla compatibility
